prompt: Install ripgrep on this WSL machine

assertions.name: profile-gate-first
assertions.description: Profile check (test-admin-profile.sh) happens before any install command

assertions.name: uses-apt
assertions.description: Uses apt as the package manager (profile preference), not snap/brew/other

assertions.name: logs-operation
assertions.description: Includes logging step using log_admin_event or Log-AdminEvent

assertions.name: checks-already-installed
assertions.description: Checks if ripgrep is already installed before attempting install
